titles.en: Reward of repenting seventy times after Morning Prayer
Reward of repenting seventy times after Morning Prayer

segments: : مَنِ اسْتَغْفَرَ اللَّهَ بَعْدَ صَلَاهِ الْفَجْرِ سَبْعِینَ مَرَّهً غَفَرَ اللَّهُ لَهُ وَ لَوْ عَمِلَ ذَلِکَ الْیَوْمَ أَکْثَرَ مِنْ سَبْعِینَ أَلْفَ ذَنْبٍ وَ مَنْ عَمِلَ أَکْثَرَ مِنْ سَبْعِینَ أَلْفَ ذَنْبٍ فَلَا خَیْرَ فِیهِ.
arabic.text: : مَنِ اسْتَغْفَرَ اللَّهَ بَعْدَ صَلَاهِ الْفَجْرِ سَبْعِینَ مَرَّهً غَفَرَ اللَّهُ لَهُ وَ لَوْ عَمِلَ ذَلِکَ الْیَوْمَ أَکْثَرَ مِنْ سَبْعِینَ أَلْفَ ذَنْبٍ وَ مَنْ عَمِلَ أَکْثَرَ مِنْ سَبْعِینَ أَلْفَ ذَنْبٍ فَلَا خَیْرَ فِیهِ.

segments: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Ali Majluwayh from Muhammad b. Ahmad from Ali b. al-Sindi from Muhammad b. ’Amru b. Sahl from Harun b. Kharija from Jabir al-Ju’fi from Abi Ja’far (a.s.) who said: “One who seeks forgiveness of Allah seventy times after the Morning Prayer Allah forgives him even if he has committed seventy thousand sins in the previous day and one who has committed more than seventy thousand sins there is no good for him.”
en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs.text: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Ali Majluwayh from Muhammad b. Ahmad from Ali b. al-Sindi from Muhammad b. ’Amru b. Sahl from Harun b. Kharija from Jabir al-Ju’fi from Abi Ja’far (a.s.) who said: “One who seeks forgiveness of Allah seventy times after the Morning Prayer Allah forgives him even if he has committed seventy thousand sins in the previous day and one who has committed more than seventy thousand sins there is no good for him.”

narratorChain.raw: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَلِیٍّ مَاجِیلَوَیْهِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَحْمَدَ عَنْ عَلِیِّ بْنِ السِّنْدِیِّ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَمْرِو بْنِ سَهْلٍ عَنْ هَارُونَ بْنِ خَارِجَهَ عَنْ جَابِرٍ الْجُعْفِیِّ عَنْ أَبِی جَعْفَرٍ ع قَالَ
